title: urbanisol tagetiflorus var. normalis
intro: Urbanisol tagetiflorus var. normalis, also known as a variety of the common dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate liver function and act as a diuretic, helping to flush out toxins from the body. The health benefits of Urbanisol tagetiflorus var. normalis include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and aid in the management of various conditions such as jaundice and liver cirrhosis. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
